datasets.name: a861eb98
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  nation_id,
  nation_name_display,
  glo_peak
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_peak_distribution
WHERE is_valid_glo = TRUE
  AND glo_peak IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: f43468b1
queryLines:
SELECT
  ns.nation_id,
  ns.race_id,
  rd.race_name,
  ns.coaches_count,
  ns.coach_participations_count,
  ns.tournaments_attended_count,
  ns.coaches_pct_nation,
  ns.coach_participations_pct_nation,
  ns.tournaments_attended_pct_nation,
  ns.avg_points_per_game AS points_per_game,
  ns.load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_race_summary ns
LEFT JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim rd
  ON ns.race_id = rd.race_id

datasets.name: b8f184d0
queryLines:
SELECT
  nc.coach_id,
  nc.race_id,
  nc.nation_id,
  nc.elo_peak,
  nc.games_with_race,
  nc.load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_coach_race_elo_peak nc
WHERE nc.is_valid_elo = TRUE
  AND nc.elo_peak IS NOT NULL
  -- Add additional filters for race_id and nation_id as needed

datasets.name: d429dda5
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_id,

datasets.name: b3fb708b
queryLines:
SELECT
  'Nation' AS scope,
  nqm.nation_id,
  nqm.coaches_count,
  nqm.value_min,
  nqm.value_p10,
  nqm.value_p25,
  nqm.value_p50,
  nqm.value_p75,
  nqm.value_p90,
  nqm.value_max,
  nqm.load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_glo_metric_quantiles nqm
JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim nd
  ON nqm.nation_id = nd.nation_id
WHERE nqm.metric_type = 'PEAK'
  AND nd.nation_name_display = :nation_name_display

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'World' AS scope,
  NULL AS nation_id,
  wqm.coaches_count,
  wqm.value_min,
  wqm.value_p10,
  wqm.value_p25,
  wqm.value_p50,
  wqm.value_p75,
  wqm.value_p90,
  wqm.value_max,
  wqm.load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.world_glo_metric_quantiles wqm
WHERE wqm.metric_type = 'PEAK'

datasets.name: 5436dca7
queryLines:
SELECT
  label,
  profile
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_profile_long
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: ab8b0908
datasets.displayName: Nations vs World and nations GLO
queryLines:
SELECT
  nd.nation_name_display,
  nqm.value_min,
  nqm.value_p25,
  nqm.value_p50,
  nqm.value_p75,
  nqm.value_max
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_glo_metric_quantiles nqm
JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim nd
  ON nqm.nation_id = nd.nation_id
WHERE nqm.metric_type = 'PEAK'
  AND (
    nd.nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nd.nation_name_display)
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'World' AS nation_name_display,
  wqm.value_min,
  wqm.value_p25,
  wqm.value_p50,
  wqm.value_p75,
  wqm.value_max
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.world_glo_metric_quantiles wqm
WHERE wqm.metric_type = 'PEAK'

ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN nation_name_display = 'World' THEN 0
    WHEN nation_name_display = :nation_name_display THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END,
  nation_name_display

queryLines:

datasets.name: 41a0b7be
queryLines:
SELECT
  bin_scheme_name_display AS metric,
  nation_name_display,
  result AS value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_global_elo_bin_results_long
WHERE nation_name_display = 'World'
   OR nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
   OR array_contains(
        coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), 
        nation_name_display
      )
ORDER BY bin_scheme_name_display, nation_name_display

datasets.name: 0d4ef502
datasets.displayName: Nations vs World and nations ELO
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    nd.nation_name_display,
    ncrp.coach_id,
    ncrp.elo_peak AS peak_elo
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_coach_race_elo_peak ncrp
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim nd
    ON ncrp.nation_id = nd.nation_id
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim rd
    ON ncrp.race_id = rd.race_id
  WHERE rd.race_name = :race
    AND ncrp.elo_peak IS NOT NULL
),

world_data AS (
  SELECT
    'World' AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
),

selected AS (
  SELECT
    nation_name_display AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
  WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
),

comparisons AS (
  SELECT
    nation_name_display AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
  WHERE array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nation_name_display)
    AND nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display
),

rest_of_world AS (
  SELECT
    'Rest of World' AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
  WHERE nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display
    AND NOT array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nation_name_display)
)

SELECT * FROM world_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM rest_of_world
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM comparisons
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN nation_label = 'World' THEN 0
    WHEN nation_label = 'Rest of World' THEN 1
    WHEN nation_label = :nation_name_display THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  nation_label

datasets.name: 1b775d70
queryLines:
WITH nation_rows AS (
  SELECT
    nation_name_display AS nation_label,
    race_id,
    race_name,
    coaches_pct_nation  AS proportion
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_race_meta
  WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
     OR array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nation_name_display)
),

counts AS (
  SELECT
    s.race_id,
    SUM(s.coaches_count) AS world_coaches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN n.nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display THEN s.coaches_count ELSE 0 END) AS rest_coaches
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_race_summary s
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim n
    ON s.nation_id = n.nation_id
  GROUP BY s.race_id
),

totals AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(world_coaches) AS world_total,
    SUM(rest_coaches)  AS rest_total
  FROM counts
),

baselines AS (
  SELECT
    'World' AS nation_label,
    c.race_id,
    r.race_name,
    c.world_coaches / NULLIF(t.world_total, 0) AS proportion
  FROM counts c
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim r
    ON c.race_id = r.race_id
  CROSS JOIN totals t

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'Rest of World' AS nation_label,
    c.race_id,
    r.race_name,
    c.rest_coaches / NULLIF(t.rest_total, 0) AS proportion
  FROM counts c
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim r
    ON c.race_id = r.race_id
  CROSS JOIN totals t
)

SELECT nation_label, race_name, proportion
FROM baselines

UNION ALL

SELECT nation_label, race_name, proportion
FROM nation_rows

ORDER BY
  race_name,
  CASE
    WHEN nation_label = 'World' THEN 0
    WHEN nation_label = 'Rest of World' THEN 1
    WHEN nation_label = :nation_name_display THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  nation_label;

datasets.name: 680c657c
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    opponent_nation_name_display AS opponent_nation,
    opponent_nation_id,
    glo_exchange_total,
    glo_exchange_mean,
    games_played,
    load_timestamp
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_vs_nation_meta
  WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    AND games_played >= 5
    AND opponent_nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display
),

ranked AS (
  SELECT
    opponent_nation,
    glo_exchange_total,
    glo_exchange_mean,
    games_played,
    load_timestamp,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY glo_exchange_total DESC, opponent_nation_id
    ) AS position,
    SUM(glo_exchange_total) OVER (
      ORDER BY glo_exchange_total DESC, opponent_nation_id
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS running_total
  FROM base
)

SELECT
  position,
  opponent_nation,
  glo_exchange_total,
  glo_exchange_mean,
  games_played,
  running_total,
  CONCAT(
    opponent_nation,
    '\nGames: ', games_played,
    '\nAvg GLO: ', ROUND(glo_exchange_mean, 2),
    '\nTotal GLO: ', ROUND(glo_exchange_total, 1)
  ) AS hover_label,
  load_timestamp
FROM ranked
ORDER BY position;

datasets.name: d1bb6b80
queryLines:
SELECT
  opponent_nation_name_display AS opponent_nation,
  games_played,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  win_pct,
  avg_score_for,
  avg_score_against,
  glo_exchange_total AS total_glo_exchange,
  glo_exchange_mean  AS avg_glo_exchange,
  load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_vs_nation_meta
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  AND games_played >= 5
  AND (
        coalesce(size(coalesce(:compare_nations, array())), 0) = 0
     OR array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), opponent_nation_name_display)
      )
ORDER BY games_played DESC, opponent_nation_name_display;

datasets.name: 0cc8c0f4
queryLines:
SELECT
  opponent_nation_name_display AS opponent_nation,
  games_played,
  win_pct,
  avg_score_for,
  avg_score_against,
  avg_score_diff,
  glo_exchange_total,
  games_score,
  closeness_score,
  games_share,
  rivalry_score
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_meta
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY rivalry_score DESC;

datasets.name: 7ad190ff
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  glo_peak,
  world_rank,
  nation_rank,
  bin_index,
  bin_lower,
  bin_upper,
  bin_label,
  opponents_count,
  win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_top_coach_opponent_bin_perf
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  AND nation_rank <= COALESCE(:top_n, 20)
ORDER BY nation_rank, bin_index;

datasets.name: efd8dfe9
datasets.displayName: Nations vs World  BOX with metrics
queryLines:
-- QUERY: nation_coach_glo_metrics_long (dashboard dataset)
--
-- PURPOSE:
--   Return per-coach GLO metric rows (long format) for:
--     1) the selected nation
--     2) optional comparison nations (multi-select)
--     3) the 'World' benchmark
--   Used for cross-nation comparisons in the dashboard.
--
-- LAYER:
--   gold_presentation (dashboard contract consumer query).
--   Metric definitions should be owned upstream (typically gold_summary) and surfaced here as shaped outputs. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0} :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}
--
-- INPUTS / PARAMETERS:
--   :nation_name_display (STRING)            -- selected nation label (UI-facing, from nation_dim).
--   :compare_nations (ARRAY<STRING> | NULL)  -- optional multi-select nation labels to compare.
--
-- OUTPUT GRAIN:
--   One row per (nation_name_display, coach_id, metric_type).
--
-- UNIQUENESS EXPECTATION:
--   Unique on (nation_name_display, coach_id, metric_type) for the returned metric_type set.
--
-- SOURCE:
--   naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_coach_glo_metrics_long
--
-- FILTER SEMANTICS:
--   - Always include 'World' rows (nation_name_display = 'World').
--   - Always include the selected nation.
--   - Include additional nations when they are in :compare_nations, excluding the selected nation.

SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  metric_type,
  metric_value,
  games_played,
  load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_coach_glo_metrics_long
WHERE metric_type IN ('PEAK', 'MEAN', 'MEDIAN')
  AND (
       nation_name_display = 'World'
    OR nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR (
         array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nation_name_display)
         AND nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display
       )
  );

-- DATASET: nation_overview_comparison_summary (filtered to one focus nation)
-- Notes:
-- - deterministic focus nation selection (ORDER BY + LIMIT 1)
-- - optional "latest load only" filter (uncomment if needed)

WITH focus AS (
  SELECT
    nation_id AS focus_nation_id
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim
  WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  ORDER BY nation_id
  LIMIT 1
)
--, latest AS (
--  SELECT
--    MAX(s.load_timestamp) AS load_timestamp
--  FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_overview_comparison_summary AS s
--  JOIN focus AS f
--    ON s.focus_nation_id = f.focus_nation_id
--)
SELECT
  s.comparison_group,
  s.coaches_count,
  s.coach_participations_count,
  s.avg_points_per_game,
  s.glo_peak_mean,
  s.glo_peak_median,
  s.glo_peak_max,
  s.load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_overview_comparison_summary AS s
JOIN focus AS f
  ON s.focus_nation_id = f.focus_nation_id
--JOIN latest AS l
--  ON s.load_timestamp = l.load_timestamp
ORDER BY
  CASE s.comparison_group
    WHEN 'NATION' THEN 1
    WHEN 'REST_OF_WORLD' THEN 2
    WHEN 'WORLD' THEN 3
    ELSE 99
  END;

datasets.name: ph5_domestic_perf
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  flag_emoji,
  games_home,
  games_away,
  ROUND(win_frac_home  * 100, 1) AS win_pct_home,
  ROUND(win_frac_away  * 100, 1) AS win_pct_away,
  games_vs_domestic,
  games_vs_foreign,
  ROUND(win_frac_vs_domestic * 100, 1) AS win_pct_vs_domestic,
  ROUND(win_frac_vs_foreign  * 100, 1) AS win_pct_vs_foreign
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_domestic_performance_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display

datasets.name: ph5_opp_bin_wdl
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  bin_index,
  bin_label_display,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ROUND(win_frac * 100, 1) AS win_pct,
  ROUND(avg_td_diff, 2)   AS avg_td_diff
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_opponent_elo_bin_wdl_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: ph5_gq_bin_wdl
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  bin_index,
  bin_label_display,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ROUND(win_frac * 100, 1) AS win_pct,
  ROUND(avg_td_diff, 2)   AS avg_td_diff
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_game_quality_bin_wdl_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display

datasets.name: ph6_power_ranking
queryLines:
SELECT
  power_rank,
  flag_emoji,
  nation_name_display,
  top_8_avg_selector_score,
  top_8_avg_glo_peak,
  coaches_in_top_8,
  coaches_eligible
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_power_ranking_display
ORDER BY power_rank

datasets.name: ph6_team_candidates
queryLines:
SELECT
  selector_rank,
  coach_name,
  ROUND(selector_score, 2)           AS selector_score,
  ROUND(rating_pctl, 1)              AS rating_pctl,
  ROUND(form_pctl, 1)                AS form_pctl,
  ROUND(opponent_strength_pctl, 1)   AS opp_strength_pctl,
  ROUND(versatility_pctl, 1)         AS versatility_pctl,
  ROUND(international_pctl, 1)       AS intl_pctl,
  ROUND(glo_peak, 1)                 AS glo_peak,
  ROUND(win_frac_vs_foreign * 100, 1) AS intl_win_pct,
  races_above_world_median,
  world_specialist_count,
  national_specialist_count
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_team_candidates_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY selector_rank
